udt_union_v0.doc: Where a pool's rate comes from. Single-variant for now; new source kinds\n(e.g. a contract quoting an APR directly, like Solidity's `ExternalRay`)\nextend this enum without a storage migration.
udt_union_v0.name: Source

tuple_v0.doc: The rate is pulled as the ln-slope of a cumulative growth index exposed\nby this contract (any fixed scale \xe2\x80\x94 only ratios are used).
tuple_v0.name: GrowthIndex

function_v0.doc: Cumulative compound index since inception (RAY). 1.0 == RAY == no growth.
function_v0.name: index

fields.doc: Cumulative compound index since inception, RAY. 1.0 == RAY == no growth.
fields.name: index_ray

fields.doc: Latest raw instantaneous APR, annualized, RAY (1e27).
fields.name: raw_apr_ray

fields.doc: Where this pool's rate comes from.
fields.name: source

fields.doc: EWMA time constant in seconds (0 disables smoothing).
fields.name: tau_sec

fields.doc: Last update timestamp (unix seconds). 0 = configured but never updated.
fields.name: updated_at

function_v0.doc: Replace the contract's wasm (admin-gated). Address and storage are kept.
function_v0.name: upgrade
index_at

function_v0.doc: Register a pool/asset and start its index at 1.0 (RAY) "from inception".\n\n`obs_capacity` sizes the per-pool observation ring buffer (must be >= 1).
function_v0.name: configure

function_v0.doc: Full state for a pool (debugging / off-chain reads).
function_v0.name: get_state

function_v0.doc: Accrued rate since pool inception as a RAY fraction (`current_index - 1`).\ne.g. `0.05 * RAY` means 5% has accrued since the pool started.
function_v0.name: accrued_ray

function_v0.doc:
Advance a `Source::GrowthIndex` pool by pulling its source index and
deriving the rate from the index growth since the previous snapshot.

Deliberately **permissionless** (mirrors the public `updateState` in the
Solidity implementation): the caller only chooses the moment of the update,
the data comes from the configured source and cannot be forged.
function_v0.name: update_state

function_v0.doc: Accrued rate over `[from, to]` as a RAY fraction:\n`index(to) / index(from) - 1`.
function_v0.name: accrued_between

function_v0.doc: Read one observation slot (debugging / off-chain reads).
function_v0.name: get_observation

function_v0.doc: Floating rate accrued over `[from, to]` as a [`Wad`] (1e18):\n`index(to) / index(from) - 1`, converted down from the RAY-scale index.
function_v0.name: get_rate_from_to

udt_struct_v0.doc: Ring bookkeeping; the slots live in storage under `(owner, slot)` keys.
udt_struct_v0.name: RingBuffer

fields.doc: Ring size; bounds how far back history reaches.
fields.name: capacity

fields.doc: Number of slots written so far (grows to `capacity`, then stays there).
fields.name: count

udt_struct_v0.doc: A snapshot of some value at a point in time (one slot of the ring).
udt_struct_v0.name: Observation

udt_struct_v0.doc: An unsigned WAD (`1e18`) fixed-point quantity: a rate, fee, or duration in seconds.
udt_struct_v0.name: Wad

udt_struct_v0.doc: A `Q64.96` sqrt price (`sqrt(token1/token0) * 2^96`). The pool-constrained range\n(`tick_math::{MIN,MAX}_SQRT_PRICE`) fits in `u128`; wide intermediates widen via\n[`to_u256`](Self::to_u256).
udt_struct_v0.name: SqrtPriceX96

udt_struct_v0.doc:
A Unix timestamp in WAD-scaled seconds (`seconds * 1e18`), the EVM
`Time.blockTimestampScaled` convention. Distinct from [`Wad`] so a point in time is
never mistaken for a duration: timestamps only compare and subtract (yielding a
[`Wad`] duration).
udt_struct_v0.name: TimestampWad
